title: anthyllis vulneraria f. oreigenes
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria f. oreigenes, also known as kidney vetch, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe, particularly in the Alps. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and prevent infection. The plant's health benefits include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as its ability to support kidney function and reduce blood pressure. Anthyllis vulneraria f. oreigenes can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and address various health concerns.
